raw_consumer_statement:
My name is XXXX XXXX and I paid a retainer fee for XXXX XXXX to the XXXX Law Firm. The money was paid to XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$3700.00} via a citi bank credit card. I told her that when the retainer was depleted to give me a call. The court documents show that XXXX XXXX XXXX 's Attorney requested payment from her husband to pay her attorney fees after the divorce ) I never gave XXXX permission to charge my credit card for {$12000.00} I am attaching a letter from her law firm asking XXXX to pay for the attorney fee. I did not authorize this payment nor would I have agreed to it. I just helped to get it started. This is fraud and I am contacting the police in XXXX Mississippi. I contacted my credit card company and reported this fraudulent charge. I want others to know that this Law Firm is fraudulent and XXXX XXXX knows that I did not authorize her to charge my card this amount. In her letter to XXXX, I actually paid a retainer of XXXX dollars and not XXXX dollars which is not correct. I have my credit card statement to prove this. Thanks for any help possible. 

Dear XXXX : For services rendered and expenses incurred in furtherance of the above-mentioned matter, kindly be advised of my firm 's latest bill. The dates of service are from XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  through XX/XX/XXXX. 
The current bill is {$13000.00}. This balance reflects charges for a total of XXXX hours spent on your divorce as specified in the attached time sheet ( courtesy reductions noted ). Your contracted billable rate is {$250.00} per hour. Billable time totals {$13000.00} in attorney fees. There are no litigation expenses currently due. The balance of your initial retainer being {$2500.00} has been credited to your account for this period. This leaves an outstanding balance of {$11000.00}. 
The bill is due and payable as of today 's date. If you would like me to charge the card previously provided for your initial retainer fees, please let me know. Otherwise, kindly provide my office with your means of payment either via email or you may call the office to arrange payment. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me at the office.

It is my pleasure to have you as a client and I appreciate your business. 
Sincerely yours, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX / XXXX XXXX Mississippi XXXX / Tel : ( XXXX ) XXXX / Fax : ( XXXX ) XXXX Web : XXXX / Email : XXXX XXXX
